expectations.text: Should describe 2-stage flow: push_all_remotes then verify_parity_post_push
expectations.evidence: 4-stage flow described (pre-flight, push, verify, decision matrix) — richer than skill version

expectations.text: Should emphasize success = (exit_code == 0) AND (post_remote_head == pre_local_head), NOT message text
expectations.evidence: Noted 'Everything up-to-date' is misleading; SHA byte-for-byte comparison required

expectations.text: Should capture pre_local_head SHA before push as expected_sha parameter
Should pass expected_sha to verify_parity_post_push to avoid race conditions
expectations.evidence: Compared to captured LOCAL_SHA in all verify methods

expectations.text: Should clarify that 'Everything up-to-date' is only success if post SHA matches pre local SHA
Should NOT recommend relying on exit code alone
